metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4069
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4A: Immunoelectron microscopy demonstrates AVP immunoreaction localised on DCV ( represented by white thin arrows) inside the axon terminals (AT) onto dendrites (dend) of a habenular neuron. Asterisks mark the docked DCVs containing AVP.
Figure 4B: A postsynaptic dendritic shaft from CA3 pyramidal the neuron of ventral hippocampus receives a presynaptic innervation from a large diameter AT containing dense-core vesicles (dcv) that are AVP positive.

The paper does not comment on antibody specificity tests, however, it mentions that non-specific antibody binding was blocked with 20% NSS in TBS for 1 h after incubation with primary rabbit anti-AVP antibody. (PMID: 23085097). Experimental description: Adult male Wistar rats were used for immuno EM labelling of AVP in habenular neurons from the thalamus and CA3 pyramidal neurons from hippocampal slices.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
